data.title: Geneva PE invests in NXXIM, an AI medical imaging platform, for faster clinician decisions; pilot deployments in 2026.(Numbers: Funding announcement, launch year, pilot deployments year)
data.description: A major investment by Geneva PE LLC in NXXIM is set to establish a state-of-the-art AI platform merging patient information to facilitate quicker clinical decisions, with initial implementations scheduled for 2026. Taking place in Miami on December 11, 2025, Geneva PE's financing aims to revolutionize medical technology by enhancing data accessibility for healthcare professionals through innovative technology.

data.title: Tenable partners with GSA OneGov to enhance cloud security for public sector, enabling proactive cyber risk reduction.
data.description: Collaboration between two entities improves security measures for cloud services in the public sector to minimize the likelihood of cyber threats. This partnership aims to enhance the overall security of government data by implementing advanced security protocols. This initiative is expected to reduce cyber risk by a significant percentage, ultimately providing better protection for sensitive government information.

data.title: Oxbridge and SurancePlus partner with Alphaledger to bring tokenized reinsurance to Solana blockchain, targeting 20% and 42% annual returns.
data.description: Oxbridge Re Holdings Ltd. (NASDAQ: OXBR) and its subsidiary, SurancePlus, have formed a partnership with Alphaledger to introduce tokenized reinsurance securities to the Solana blockchain. This collaboration was revealed at Solana Breakpoint 2025 in Grand Cayman. The goal is to make a traditionally institutional and uncorrelated asset class accessible to a wider range of investors by utilizing on-chain real-world assets. SurancePlus will offer tokenized reinsurance products through Alphaledger's Solana-native platform, with targeted annual returns of 20% and 42% for balanced-yield and high-yield products respectively. These fully collateralized instruments will be accessible to eligible Reg D and Reg S participants, such as sovereign wealth funds, institutions, corporates, and qualified accredited investors.

data.title: AGM on 11 December 2025 approved resolutions as per agenda.
data.description: During the annual general meeting held today, the attendees approved a series of resolutions outlined in the agenda.

data.title: AIP appoints Prof. Yi Cao of Nanjing Univ. as Editor-in-Chief of Biophysics Reviews, enhancing scholarship in biophysics.
data.description: In December 11, 2025, AIP Publishing announced that Professor Yi Cao from Nanjing University has been designated as the new Editor-in-Chief of Biophysics Reviews. This journal focuses on advancing research in biophysics, biomaterials, and other related interdisciplinary areas. Professor Cao, a full-time faculty member at Nanjing University, brings his expertise to this role, overseeing the scholarly direction of the journal.

data.title: Tosi secures six-figure deal with EPIC Crude, boosting presence in U.S. and oil industry.
data.description: Based in Oulu, Finland, Tosi, a prominent provider of OT cybersecurity platforms, has recently solidified a substantial subscription deal with EPIC Crude, a key player in crude oil transportation services based in Irving, Texas. The agreement, which was formalized earlier this year, involves a six-figure contract, marking Tosi's most significant subscription contract thus far. This strategic partnership not only boosts Tosi's foothold in the U.S. market but also cements its standing within the oil and gas sector. The deal encompasses the comprehensive replacement and enhancement of cybersecurity measures for EPIC Crude.

data.title: CompleteSMS introduces new Gmail add-on for SMS management, enhancing customer experience.
data.description: A popular SMS solutions provider, Red Oxygen's CompleteSMS, unveiled a new Gmail™ add-on on December 11, 2025. This feature enables users to conveniently handle text messages from their accounts. The product aims to streamline the process of sending, receiving, and replying to messages. The add-on is expected to enhance user experience and boost efficiency in communication.

data.title: Brainworks Ventures launches $50M AI-native fund in San Francisco to support AI-first startups, revolutionizing venture capital.
data.description: A new development in San Francisco as Brainworks Ventures introduces a $50 million fund dedicated to AI innovation. The fund aims to revolutionize venture capital by supporting startups that prioritize AI technology. These startups are expected to grow rapidly and require less capital compared to traditional businesses.

data.title: Maxio launches Maxio MCP for finance teams, providing secure AI governance.
data.description: Today, in Atlanta, Maxio unveiled Maxio MCP, a secure AI governance layer specifically crafted for finance teams. This announcement heralds the widespread availability of the product to the general public.

data.title: Fountain Shift introduces AI to improve scheduling, compliance, and tracking, offering enhanced visibility into shift management.
data.description: Fountain has revealed significant upgrades to Fountain Shift, a platform designed to provide exceptional insight into shift-based scheduling and management.

data.title: CapIntel partners with KPMG Canada to modernize wealth management through digital innovation and technology simplification.
data.description: In Toronto, CapIntel, a leading financial technology company, has partnered with KPMG Canada in a strategic collaboration agreement. This partnership aims to assist wealth management institutions in upgrading their advisor and client experiences through digital innovation, simplifying tech stacks, and establishing scalable implementation frameworks. This collaboration will leverage KPMG Canada's advisory expertise and CapIntel's technology solutions to drive modernization in the wealth management sector. This initiative showcases a commitment to enhancing the industry through innovative strategies.

data.title: Flitto expands on US East Coast through AIIA program, focusing on AI translation growth with new partnerships.
data.description: Leading South Korean company, Flitto, is enhancing its presence on the U.S. East Coast through the AIIA program, resulting in significant advancements in AI translation. This initiative has led to the establishment of key partnerships and implementation of innovative market approaches.

data.title: Bookkeeper360 introduces AI-powered virtual CFO in new mobile and web app for real-time insights, integrates with QuickBooks, Xero, and Gusto.
data.description: Bookkeeper360, a reputable online bookkeeping service established in 2012, has recently unveiled its new iOS and Android mobile and web app. This platform includes BOLT (Business Optimization Learning Technology), an AI-driven virtual CFO. The service, recognized as the top online bookkeeping service by NerdWallet and Forbes, caters to thousands of small businesses and CPAs. By integrating with QuickBooks, Xero, and Gusto, the app offers real-time financial analysis and actionable insights via visual dashboards.

data.title: Nintendo Download this week features Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Anniversary Edition on Nintendo Switch with over 200 Game of the Year Awards.
data.description: This week in Redmond, Washington, the Nintendo Download includes new content for Nintendo Switch and the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2. The highlight is The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Anniversary Edition, offering a legendary open-world adventure. This game, which has won over 200 Game of the Year Awards, revolutionized open-world fantasy gaming over a decade ago. The Anniversary Edition provides enhanced performance for the Nintendo Switch 2, allowing players to experience the full adventure in a new way.

data.title: Socure appoints Matthew Thompson as President & Chief Commercial Officer to lead global expansion. AI platform aims to become industry's first decacorn.
data.description: In Incline Village, Nevada, Socure, the leading AI platform for worldwide identity and risk decisions, has announced the appointment of Matthew Thompson as President and Chief Commercial Officer. Thompson will work alongside Founder and CEO Johnny Ayers to oversee the company's international growth, commercial strategies, public sector engagements, and workforce expansion, aiming to advance the establishment of the industry's first decacorn. With Thompson, a renowned digital identity expert and accomplished combat veteran, previously holding the role of Chief Revenue Officer at Socure.

data.title: Argus introduces 7 rare earth oxide prices in the US, enhancing transparency for downstream manufacturers.
data.description: Argus, a leading global energy and commodity price reporting agency, has introduced a groundbreaking suite of seven delivered US rare earth oxide prices. These price assessments offer vital transparency for downstream manufacturers. This initiative, launched on Dec. 11, 2025, marks a significant step in providing comprehensive pricing information. The inclusion of seven distinct price evaluations signifies a new level of insight into the rare earth oxide market, benefiting stakeholders in the industry.

data.title: Suzanne Shelton joins Exceptional Women Alliance (EWA) as CEO of Shelton Group, focused on sustainability.
data.description: In Los Angeles on December 11, 2025, the Exceptional Women Alliance (EWA) announced the addition of Suzanne Shelton to their team. Shelton, the Founder and CEO of Shelton Group, a prominent marketing communications agency specializing in sustainability (now ERM Shelton), joins EWA in a move that enhances their expertise in this field. This move brings Shelton's wealth of experience to the organization, further positioning EWA as a leading force in promoting sustainable practices.
